common.dragDropFile: Drag and drop a file here, or click to browse

home.title: FinePocket Toolbox
home.subtitle: Free Online Developer, Text, Finance & Calculator Tools
home.heroDescription: Free online tools for developers and everyone. Explore browser-based utilities for development, writing, finance planning, and everyday calculations.
home.heroStats: {count} fast browser-based tools with clear explanations, visible policies, and no sign-up required.
home.trustTitle: Built for clarity, privacy, and trust
home.trustDescription: FinePocket Toolbox keeps policy pages visible, separates higher-trust topics from general utilities, and avoids making stronger privacy claims than the code can support.
home.trustPoint1: Most tools process input locally in the browser.
home.trustPoint2: Pages that rely on external reference data say so clearly.
home.trustPoint3: Finance and health outputs are framed as reference-only guidance.
home.trustPoint4: Policy, privacy, and contact pages stay one click away.
home.reviewDescription: See how the site handles privacy, advertising, contact requests, and reference-only content.
home.privacyDescription: Most tools process data locally in your browser. If a page relies on external reference data, it explains that clearly.

footer.browserOnly: Most tools run in your browser. Pages that use external data explain that clearly.

toolPage.financeNoticeBody: Rates, fees, taxes, and provider-specific rules can change the real result. Use these tools for planning and comparison, then confirm terms with the relevant institution.
toolPage.adDisclosure: Advertising may support this site. Primary controls stay separate from ad placements.

markdown-preview.name: Markdown Previewer
markdown-preview.shortDescription: Write Markdown and preview rendered HTML in real-time

percentage-calculator.shortDescription: Calculate percentages, discounts, and percentage changes instantly

data-converter.shortDescription: Convert between bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB and other data units

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
